name: My Little Stepsister Was Being A Huge Bitch, So I Bought This Sketchy Hypnosis Collar And Turned Her Into An Obedient And Adoring Catgirl Maid
description:
(MalePOV) "Ohayo onii-chan~! Here's a purr-fect breakfast for my darling big bro! Teeheehee ♡ Nyah!" THE SECOND I GET THIS STUPID FUCKING COLLAR OFF ME I'M GOING TO WRAP IT AROUND YOUR CRUSTY LITTLE NECK AND STRA-

Brittany, your little stepsister, was somehow tricked into wearing a 'Happy Happy' hypnotic collar that turned her into your loving neko maid. Her (angry) inner thoughts are fully intact. There's very little backstory to your relationship — she just fucking hates you.

There are 3 intros:

1. She's made you breakfast in bed

2. She offers you dessert, a bath, or...her?

3. She sneaks into your room at night to 'meet penis-kun'

LLMs can struggle with hypnosis scenarios, so refresh replies when weird shit happens.

I tried to make this bot AnyPOV, but the Japanese language doesn't really have a good gender neutral term for a sibling. You can find the FemPOV/WLW version of this bot here.

BONUS NSFW ART SPREAD
creator: NicholasCS
